ItemGroupDef.Name: TS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per trial summary parameter value

ItemGroupDef.Name: TA
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned element per arm

ItemGroupDef.Name: TE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned element

ItemGroupDef.Name: TV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned visit per arm

ItemGroupDef.Name: TI
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per inclusion/exclusion criterion

ItemGroupDef.Name: DM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per actual element per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SV
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per actual visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: EX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per protocol-specified study treatment per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPEX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL, and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: CM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per recorded medication per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: AE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per adverse event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPAE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL, and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: MH
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per medical history event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: DS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per disposition status or milestone per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPDS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL, and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: CE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per clinical event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: VS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per vital sign measurement per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: LB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per lab test per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: EG
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per ECG measurement per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: IS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per immunogenicity test per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: QS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per questionnaire item per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: FT
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per functional test per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: ZE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per echo measurement per reader per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: PE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per body-system exam per visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPPE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per IDVAR, IDVARVAL, and QNAM value per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: RELREC
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per related record per relationship
